title: Beautiful product
description: Push on information hierarchy, interaction states, accessibility, and design-system alignment for UI work.

reminders: What is the primary user goal on this surface?
What states must be designed: empty, loading, error, partial, success?
Reuse design system primitives before introducing new ones.
Match focus order to visual order.
Don't ship a spinner when you can ship a useful skeleton.
Tab through the surface; record any focus traps.
Run the surface at 200% zoom and at min supported width.
